top_signals.title: Bitcoin price sets $64.5K week-to-date low as Strategy selling worries return
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin circled $65,000 after downside BTC price pressure into the FOMC meeting as analysis warned over the impact of Strategy potentially selling more BTC in the future.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Target, Walmart and Amazon among brands losing LGBTQ+ consumer spending, new survey says
top_signals.summary: LGBTQ+ consumers are shifting spending toward companies they view as supporting DEI and away from those seen as retreating, HRC survey finds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EarnOS launches anti-AI slop app, raises $6 million from 1kx, Circle and Coinbase
top_signals.summary: Ero app is designed to help brands verify human internet traffic, reduce wastes caused by bots, and reward "authentic digital behavior," said EarnOS.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: GitHub dismissed security reports on flaws now exploited by supply-chain worm, researchers say
top_signals.summary: GitHub rejected two formal vulnerability reports identifying design flaws that researchers say are enabling variants of the Shai-Hulud supply-chain worm to infect and compromise hundreds of software packages and developer accounts worldwide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX stock sinks 5%, losing momentum after a multiday rally
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk's space and AI company has seen its stock surge since its blockbuster IPO on Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK Trade Tariff: duty suspensions and autonomous tariff quotas
top_signals.summary: Temporary duty suspensions and autonomous tariff quotas (ATQs) for importing goods into the UK.

top_signals.title: BitGo stock surges on $50 million share buyback as value languishes 65% below IPO price
Small businesses can help solve defence procurement
top_signals.summary: A neutral vendor model for defence procurement will solve issues of scale, reduce bureaucracy and reduce the risks of engagement for all sides, says Rob Levene John Healey and Al Carns may have quit, but the final answer to the question that triggered their exits as defence secretary and armed forces minister has been left [...]
